title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS RECOVERY CENTER OUTPATIENT SERVICES OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides both general and intensive treatment modalities for substance abuse. Offers family and individual treatment, assessments, individual and group counseling, medication-assisted treatment, toxicology testing, DUII services, care coordination, and case management. 10822 SE 82nd Avenue Suite K Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Age 18 and older; may include patients with cases in the child welfare or criminal justice systems Hours: Monday-Friday 9:30am-8pm (855) 733-2632 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (855) 733-2632 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurances. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9:30am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 31 King Road, 71 60th/122nd Avenue, 72 Killingsworth/82nd Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
